steps.title: Apply the triangle angle sum property
steps.content: The sum of all interior angles in a triangle equals 180°. This is a fundamental property of all triangles.

steps.title: Substitute and solve for angle C
steps.content:
Substitute A = 54° and B = 90° into the angle sum equation:
$$54° + 90° + C = 180°$$
$$144° + C = 180°$$
$$C = 180° - 144° = 36°$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
